title: scorzoneroides autumnalis var. keretina
intro: Scorzoneroides autumnalis var. keretina, also known as autumn knapweed, is a perennial plant belonging to the sunflower family (Asteraceae). The medicinal properties of Scorzoneroides autumnalis var. keretina include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities, which contribute to its use in traditional medicine. The plant is said to have several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Scorzoneroides autumnalis var. keretina is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
